description: hex-agent as a Claude Code-independent runtime in Docker AI Sandbox microVMs with SpacetimeDB WebSocket coordination

specs.description: hex_write_file MCP tool writes a file inside /workspace
specs.given: hex-agent MCP server is running inside a microVM with /workspace bind-mounted to a git worktree
specs.then: File is written to disk and the tool returns { success: true, path: '/workspace/src/adapters/foo.rs' }

specs.given: hex-agent MCP server is running inside a microVM
specs.when: hex_write_file({ path: '/etc/passwd', content: '...' }) or hex_write_file({ path: '../../host-file', content: '...' }) is called
specs.then: Tool returns { success: false, error: 'path_traversal_rejected' } and no file is written

domain_conventions.security: safePath() must reject any path that resolves outside /workspace

specs.description: hex_write_file rejects adapter files that import from other adapters
specs.given: A file being written to adapters/secondary/db-adapter.rs that contains 'use crate::adapters::primary::cli'
specs.when: hex_write_file is called with content containing a cross-adapter import
specs.then: Tool returns { success: false, error: 'boundary_violation', detail: 'adapters must not import other adapters' } and no file is written

domain_conventions.hex_rule: ADR boundary rule: adapters/secondary must never import adapters/primary and vice versa

specs.description: hex-agent connects to SpacetimeDB via WebSocket from inside the microVM and sends heartbeats
specs.given: A microVM is launched with SPACETIMEDB_HOST=ws://host.docker.internal:3033 and SPACETIMEDB_TOKEN=<valid token>
specs.when: hex-agent starts up inside the microVM
specs.then: Agent registers in the agent-registry SpacetimeDB module and sends a heartbeat within 30 seconds; the agent appears as 'active' in hex agent list

specs.description: hex-nexus spawn endpoint launches a microVM and returns agent identity
specs.given: hex-nexus is running, Docker AI Sandboxes is available, and a valid worktree path exists
specs.when: POST /api/agents/spawn is called with { worktree_path, task_id, secrets: ['OPENROUTER_API_KEY'] }
specs.then: Returns { container_id, agent_id, status: 'starting' } and the microVM launches with the correct env vars injected

specs.description: Two agents spawned in parallel cannot collide on filesystem
specs.given: Two HexFlo tasks exist for different worktrees (feat/foo/ports and feat/foo/adapters)
specs.when: Both agents are spawned simultaneously and each writes to their assigned /workspace
specs.then: Both writes succeed; neither agent can read or write the other's worktree; both complete without conflict

specs.description: hex-agent completes a task and calls task_complete reducer
specs.given: hex-agent is running inside a microVM with HEXFLO_TASK=<task-id> and has finished its coding work
specs.when: All tool calls succeed and tests pass
specs.then: hex-agent calls the task_complete SpacetimeDB reducer with the task_id and a result summary; HexFlo marks the task as completed

specs.description: subagent-start hook blocks non-worktree execution when HEXFLO_TASK is set
specs.given: A Claude Code subagent is started with HEXFLO_TASK set in its prompt and cwd is the project root (not a worktree)
specs.then: Hook exits with error 'worktree_required: swarm agents must run in an isolated worktree, not the project root' and the agent does not proceed

specs.description: hex-agent routes low-complexity tasks to local Ollama model
specs.given: hex-agent agentic loop receives a task with a short, low-complexity prompt and Ollama is available at bazzite:11434
specs.when: The agent selects a model for the task
specs.then: The request is routed to the local Ollama model (e.g. qwen3.5:9b); no OpenRouter or Anthropic API call is made

domain_conventions.routing: ADR-2603271000: complexity score Low → min quantization Q2 → local model preferred

specs.description: hex-agent escalates to frontier model after local model fails N iterations
specs.given: hex-agent is attempting a high-complexity task; local model has produced failing tests for 3 consecutive iterations
specs.then: hex-agent escalates to the next quantization tier (e.g. OpenRouter frontier model) and retries the task

specs.description: Credentials are never written to the microVM filesystem
specs.given: A microVM is spawned with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and OPENROUTER_API_KEY injected as env vars
specs.when: The agent runs and the microVM filesystem is inspected
specs.then: No credential values appear in any file on the microVM filesystem; keys exist only as in-memory env vars

domain_conventions.security: Docker MCP Gateway injects secrets as env vars only; no .env files, no filesystem writes

specs.description: hex-agent microVM is cleaned up when the task completes or the container exits
specs.given: A microVM was spawned for a HexFlo task that has now completed
specs.when: The container exits (normally or via crash)
specs.then: The SpacetimeDB agent record is marked stale within 45 seconds; any incomplete tasks assigned to this agent are reclaimed by HexFlo cleanup
